title: Filter state round-trip (smoke test)
test_procedure: Apply filter → reload page → verify persistence

steps.notes: Filter applied, UI updated with filter pill and badge count '1'
Filter pill 'Status: CONFIRMED' visible after reload. Active count badge shows '1'. Calendar view shows only confirmed bookings.

steps.action: Verify API calls include filter parameters
steps.notes: Network inspection: GET /api/v1/booking/search?status=CONFIRMED request made. Response shows filtered results.

notes: Filter state correctly persists across page reload. Client-side storage and server-side API parameters are consistent.
